intent: Write a 'lazy-homemaker automation' report combining storefront small-appliance options with community tricks. (1) One Stop Market shopping site — browse the home-kitchen and health-household categories and collect at least 4 small automation products (slow cooker, robot vacuum-adjacent, dispenser, programmable device). Record name, price, rating, review count. (2) Reddit — browse /f/LifeProTips AND /f/AskReddit for posts on household-chore automation tips or gadgets that saved time. Collect at least 3 posts with title, score, comment count. The report must: (a) present storefront picks with stats, (b) rank by weekly time saved (estimate), (c) integrate community picks, (d) close with a top-2 'buy these first' kit. Cite every claim.
author_notes: Medium tier. Home automation via small appliances.
